note_account: real non-prod dev account id redacted to the 000000000000 placeholder per public-repo policy.
method: Live probe: created a real Harness (Bedrock Haiku, no tools) via the control plane; it reached status=READY; then called InvokeHarness. Separately ran iam:SimulatePrincipalPolicy for the calling principal on the relevant actions.
finding: The AgentCore CONTROL plane is fully usable on this account (CreateMemory, CreateEvaluator, CreateGateway+CreateGatewayTarget, CreateHarness->READY, CreateHarnessEndpoint all succeed live), but the INVOKE data plane is gated at call time.

evidence.create_harness: SUCCESS — harness sentinel_loopprobe_<redacted> created and reached status=READY
evidence.invoke_harness: AccessDeniedException: 'not authorized to perform: bedrock-agentcore:InvokeHarness on resource sentinel_loopprobe_<redacted>'
evidence.create_agent_runtime: AccessDeniedException (same class; validated once successfully on an earlier date — see live_a2a_runtime_result.json)

diagnosis: IAM policy simulation returns 'allowed' for InvokeHarness / CreateAgentRuntime, yet the live calls are DENIED. The calling principal holds AdministratorAccess, so this is not an IAM permission gap. This is a SERVICE-SIDE account-level opt-in/allowlist gate on the invoke data plane that is invisible to iam:SimulatePrincipalPolicy — the same gate class previously observed on CreateAgentRuntime. It is not self-resolvable from the account; it requires a service-side allowlisting for this account.

impact_on_external_proofs.cross_session_memory_recall: Partially affected only by async timing, not by this gate: CreateMemory/CreateEvent/RetrieveMemoryRecords all succeed; write + multi-tenant isolation proven synchronously (tenant-1=1 event, tenant-2=0); SEMANTIC extraction is async and did not surface within the observed window (documented async-extraction limitation).
impact_on_external_proofs.closed_loop_M12: BLOCKED — the autonomous loop needs a live InvokeHarness agent turn to score/iterate; control-plane promote (CreateHarnessEndpoint) works, the invoke step is gated.
impact_on_external_proofs.a2a_on_runtime_M11: BLOCKED — needs CreateAgentRuntime/InvokeAgentRuntime; validated once on an earlier date, currently gated.

honesty: Reported exactly as observed. The invoke data plane could not be exercised on this account in this session; no invoke result is fabricated. The control-plane and gateway/evaluator/memory proofs stand on their own live evidence.
note: Root-cause diagnosis, not a workaround. AgentCore control-plane provisioning is fully live on this non-prod account; the invoke data plane (InvokeHarness / InvokeAgentRuntime) is blocked by a service-side account gate that IAM simulation does not reflect. The two invoke-dependent EXTERNAL proofs (M12 closed loop, M11 A2A-on-Runtime) are therefore honestly marked blocked; the three non-invoke EXTERNAL proofs (CUSTOM_JWT gateway, managed Evaluator, Memory write+isolation) are proven live.
